features.name: User Registration
features.description: Allows new users to create an account.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allows users to authenticate and receive JWT tokens.

features.name: User Logout
features.description: Logs out the user and invalidates session.

features.name: View Profile
features.description: Fetches current user's profile information.

features.name: Update Profile
features.description: Allows user to update personal information.

features.name: Change Password
features.description: Allows user to change their account password.

features.name: Manage Shipping Profiles
features.description: Users can add, update, delete, and set default shipping addresses.

features.name: List Products
features.description: View list of active products with pagination, filtering, and sorting.

features.name: Search Products
features.description: Autocomplete search for products.

features.name: Special Product Lists
features.description: View new arrivals, best sellers, and hot products.

features.name: Product Details
features.description: View detailed information, images, and variants of a specific product.

features.name: List Categories
features.description: View available product categories.

features.name: List Brands
features.description: View available brands and their products.

features.name: View Campaigns
features.description: View active promotional campaigns and discounted products.

features.name: View Active Vouchers
features.description: View vouchers available for the user to apply.

features.name: Manage Cart
features.description: Add items, update quantities/variants, remove items, or clear cart.

features.name: Apply Voucher
features.description: Apply a voucher code to calculate cart discount.

features.name: Preview Checkout
features.description: Calculate final price, discounts, and validate stock before placing order.

features.name: Place Order
features.description: Submit a new order from cart.

features.name: View My Orders
features.description: View order history for current user.

features.name: Order Detail
features.description: View details of a specific user order.

features.name: Cancel Order
features.description: Cancel an order if it is still in pending status.

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: View summary statistics, revenue, and top products.

features.name: Manage Products
features.description: Create, read, update, and toggle status of products.

features.name: Manage Product Images
features.description: Upload and delete product images via Cloudinary.

features.name: Manage Product Variants
features.description: Add, update, and delete product variants.

features.name: Manage Categories
features.description: Create, read, update, and delete categories.

features.name: Manage Brands
features.description: Create, read, update, and delete brands.

features.name: Manage Vouchers
features.description: Create, read, update, and soft delete vouchers.

features.name: Manage Orders
features.description: List all orders, view details, and update statuses.

features.name: Manage Campaigns
features.description: Create, update, toggle status, and delete campaigns.

features.name: AI Text Generation
features.description: Generate descriptions using Groq LLM API for products, vouchers, and campaigns.

features.name: Email Notifications
features.description: Automated email notifications via SMTP for order placement and cancellation.

features.name: Image Hosting
features.description: Image upload and deletion via Cloudinary API.

features.name: JWT Token Refresh
features.description: Issues a new access token using a valid refresh token stored in localStorage. Handled by axios interceptor automatically.

features.name: Related Products
features.description: Fetches products in the same category as a given product for cross-sell display on the product detail page.

features.name: Buy Now (Direct Checkout)
features.description: Allows user to purchase a single product variant directly, bypassing the cart. Handled via directItem payload in checkout/preview endpoints.

features.name: Bulk Order Status Update
features.description: Admin can update the status of multiple orders at once. Iterates each order through the valid-transition state machine.

features.name: Homepage Display
features.description: Server-side rendered homepage showing hero section, category grid, active campaign banners, new arrivals, and discounted products.

features.name: Product Filtering & Pagination
features.description: Filter products by category, brand, gender, price range, and sort order. Server-side pagination with configurable page size.

features.name: Admin Order Filtering
features.description: Admin can filter the order list by status, user_id, and date range (from_date, to_date).

features.name: Toggle Campaign Status
features.description: Admin can activate or deactivate a campaign independently of editing. Guards prevent editing already-active campaigns.

features.name: Set Default Shipping Profile
features.description: User marks one shipping profile as the default address, used as pre-selected address on checkout.

features.name: Stock Validation & Restore
features.description: Atomically decrements stock on order placement and restores it on cancellation (by user or admin) within a MySQL transaction.

features.name: Campaign Discount Engine
features.description: Automatically selects the best applicable campaign (PERCENTAGE, FIXED_PRICE, TIER_DISCOUNT, FREESHIP) at checkout preview and order placement. Supports tier-based thresholds.
entry_points: Triggered internally by orderService.previewOrder and orderService.placeOrder

features.name: Voucher Validation Engine
features.description: Validates voucher (active status, dates, global and per-user usage limits, min order value) and calculates discount amount (PERCENTAGE, FIXED, FREESHIP).
entry_points: Triggered internally by orderService during checkout

features.name: Price Change Detection
features.description: At checkout preview, compares current product prices against the cart price snapshots and notifies the user of any price changes since they added items.

features.name: Admin Authentication Guard
features.description: verifyToken + requireAdmin middleware chain ensures all /admin/* routes reject unauthenticated or non-admin requests.

features.name: Auto SKU Generation
features.description: Automatically generates a unique SKU from brand, product name, color, size, and random hex suffix when admin creates a variant without providing one.
entry_points: Triggered on POST /api/admin/products/:id/variants when sku is empty

features.name: Order Snapshot
features.description: At order placement, snapshots product name, size, color, unit price, and shipping address so historical records remain accurate even if master data changes later.

steps.description: User views products and selects an item.
User adds the item to their cart.
User applies a discount voucher to the cart.
User previews the checkout details.
User submits and places the order.
System automatically sends an order confirmation email to the admin/user.
Admin reviews the order and updates its status (e.g., to fulfilled).

flows.name: Admin Product Creation Flow

steps.description: Admin initiates product creation and fills base info.
Admin requests AI to generate a product description based on keywords.
Admin uploads product images which are saved to Cloudinary.
System processes and hosts the uploaded images.
Admin adds product variants (size, color, etc).
Admin toggles the product status to active, making it visible to users.

flows.exit_point: product is active and available to users

steps.description: User views their order history.
User requests to cancel a pending order.
System cancels the order and triggers a cancellation email notification to admin.

flows.name: Admin Campaign Creation with AI Description

steps.description: Admin navigates to Campaigns page and clicks 'New Campaign'.
Admin fills campaign name, type (PERCENTAGE/FIXED_PRICE/TIER_DISCOUNT/FREESHIP), dates, and product list.
Admin requests Groq AI to generate a promotional description.
Admin submits the form; backend validates tiers/config, saves campaign and linked products in a transaction.
Admin toggles campaign status to active when the start date is reached.

flows.exit_point: campaign status = active, visible on storefront

steps.description: New user registers with username, email, and password.
User logs in and receives access + refresh tokens stored in localStorage.
User browses homepage and product listings.
User adds a shipping profile for delivery.
User adds items to cart.
User proceeds to checkout and places order.
System sends order notification email to admin.

flows.name: Campaign Discount Applied at Checkout

steps.description: User views storefront showing active campaign banners.
User adds campaign-eligible products to cart.
User previews checkout; system's campaign engine auto-selects the best applicable campaign.
User optionally applies a voucher for additional discount.
System calculates final total: subtotal - campaign_discount - voucher_discount + shipping_fee.
User confirms and places order; stock is decremented atomically.

flows.exit_point: order persisted with campaign_id, campaign_discount_total recorded

flows.name: Admin Order Fulfillment Pipeline

steps.description: Admin views orders dashboard, filters by status=pending.
Admin reviews order details and verifies items.
Admin updates status from pending → confirmed.
Admin updates status from confirmed → shipping.
Admin updates status from shipping → delivered.
Optionally, admin uses bulk-status update to process multiple orders at once.

flows.exit_point: order status = delivered, revenue counted in dashboard

flows.name: Admin Voucher Creation with AI

steps.description: Admin opens voucher creation form and enters code, discount type, value, limits, and validity dates.
Admin requests AI to generate a short promotional description for the voucher.
Admin submits; backend checks code uniqueness, saves voucher with created_by admin ID.

flows.exit_point: voucher is_active=1, available for users to apply
